name: reveal
description: Animated click-to-reveal panel for answers, hints, and spoilers — uses smooth Collapse animation
whenToUse: Use to hide a single answer, solution, or hint the reader must actively choose to reveal. Common in tutorials and exercises.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for navigation or multi-section disclosure — use Accordion. Do not use when content should always be visible.
example:
<Reveal label="Show solution">
  Use a hash map keyed on the complement: `target - nums[i]`.
</Reveal>
